results.title: CM Punk to Defend WWE Championship Against Cody Rhodes at SummerSlam 2026
results.description: CM Punk is gearing up to defend his Undisputed WWE Championship against Cody Rhodes at SummerSlam 2026. The match is set to headline the first night of the event, while a tag team match featuring Punk and Rhodes against Gunther and Sami Zayn will take place on July 18th. This exciting buildup promises thrilling action as both competitors prepare for their championship showdown.

results.title: Last solider given Victoria Cross by Queen honoured
results.description: Pte Charles Ward, from Leeds, delivered a message requesting help while under enemy fire.

results.title: IPL 2027: CSK hint at ‘Rishabh Pant-Kuldeep Yadav’ like trade after denying Hardik Pandya deal with MI
results.description: Before the IPL 2026 season, CSK traded Sam Curran and Ravindra Jadeja for Sanju Samson with RR. The post IPL 2027: CSK hint at ‘Rishabh Pant-Kuldeep Yadav’ like trade after denying Hardik Pandya deal with MI appeared first on Inside Sport India .

results.title: Vietnam Enhances Pickleball Rankings with Global Rating System
results.description: Vietnam is making strides in the world of pickleball by partnering with the Dynamic Universal Pickleball Rating (DUPR) to enhance its player ranking system. This collaboration will allow local players to earn globally recognized ratings from domestic competitions, facilitating their participation in international tournaments. As Vietnam establishes itself as a leading pickleball market in Asia, this initiative promises to streamline the ranking process and connect its players with the global competitive landscape. Discover how this partnership is set to transform the sport in Vietnam.

results.title: UST, PVA prevail in Shakey’s junior volleyball opener
results.description: University of Santo Tomas flexed its firepower and clobbered Arellano University High School, 25-16, 25-12, for a hot start in the 2026 Shakey’s Juniors National Invitationals on Saturday, July 11, at the Playtime FilOil Arena in San Juan. Prized setter Andreaj Tan Chun Bing displayed her playmaking brilliance as the Junior Tigresses dispatched the Lady [...]
